title: pouteria baillonii
intro: Pouteria baillonii, also known as the baillon's pouteria or the white sapote, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pouteria baillonii include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Pouteria baillonii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
